proposal.claim: defer VC broadcast, new leader pulls from quorum. O(n^2) -> O(n) communication
proposal.structural_delta: communication complexity during view change: O(n^2) -> O(n)
proposal.diff:
--- a/view_change.tla
+++ b/view_change.tla
 InitiateViewChange(replica) ==
-  /\ Broadcast(replica, <<"vc", view_number[replica] + 1, log[replica]>>)
+  /\ vc_pending' = [vc_pending EXCEPT ![replica] = <<view_number[replica]+1, log[replica]>>]
+PullViewChangeState(new_leader, replica) ==
+  /\ vc_pending[replica] # <<>>
+  /\ vc_messages' = ...
proposal.novel_technique_description: defer broadcast when next phase only partially reads, pull on demand with TEE/quorum consistency

review.argument: pull-based works: quorum suffices, TEE prevents equivocation on pulled state

judgment.reasoning: novel and sound. TEE + quorum intersection guarantee consistency.
